title: Amazon Basics Digital kitchen scales with LCD display (with batteries), Black and Stainless Steel, BPA free, Weighs up to 11 pounds
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: Digital stainless steel kitchen scales with large LCD display
Weighs up to 11 lbs (approx 5000 grams) of food (minimum weight 2 g)
Modern sensor technology delivers fast and precise measurement results
Display measurement results in ounces, grams, pounds
The tare button subtracts the packaging weight so that you only weigh what you want
description: From the manufacturer Amazon Basics Digital Kitchen Scale A useful kitchen tool, the Amazon Basics digital kitchen scale makes it easy to quickly weigh ingredients or food items. It's particularly handy for baked goods where exact amounts of flour make all the difference between perfection and overly dry cookies or cake. Use the scale for weighing anything from ingredients for new or favorite recipes to health-conscious meal plans. Details Widescreen LCD screen Weighs up to 11 pounds (about 5000 grams) Results in ounces, grams, pounds, or kilograms Unit button converts unit of measurement Tare button subtracts the weight of any container or bowl Large weighing platform; easy to clean and store; batteries included Smart Design The Amazon Basics digital kitchen scale features a generous weighing platform, which effortlessly accommodates larger bowls or bulkier foods. Pressing the Unit button automatically converts the unit of measurement--from ounces to grams or pounds to kilograms--and instantly displays the results on the LCD screen. Convenient Size Measuring approximately 21 x 17.8 x 3.2 cm (LxWxH), the digital kitchen scale offers a small, compact size that takes up minimal counter space. The smooth surface of the scale makes it easy to clean as needed--wiping it down with a wet cloth is usually all it takes. When not in use, it can be conveniently tucked away in a pantry or cupboard. Battery Operated The Amazon Basics digital kitchen scale runs on two AAA batteries (Amazon Basics batteries included), and the battery compartment on the bottom of the scale offers easy access--no screwdriver needed. Easy to Use Automatic Shut Off The scale will automatically shut off if the display shows ‘0’ or the same number for 2 minutes. To shut off the scale manually, press the Power/Tare button for approximately 3 seconds. Tare Button The tare button subtracts container weight to zero out the scale so you only measure what you want. All you have to do is place the container on the scale, then press the Tare button to reset the scale to zero. Instant, Accurate Responses The scale's advanced sensor technology delivers quick, accurate responses, unlike manual scales, which can create delays in a fast-paced kitchen. The digital kitchen scale instantly weighs up to 11 pounds (about 5000 grams) at a time. It will weight products that are a minimum of 2 grams, at full gram increments.
